Uses of Interface
com.irurueta.ar.sfm.InitialCamerasEstimatorListener

  • Packages that use InitialCamerasEstimatorListener 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.ar.sfm
    This package contains classes related to Structure From Motion techniques in order to obtain 3D reconstructed data from matched points obtained when a camera moves

    • Uses of InitialCamerasEstimatorListener in com.irurueta.ar.sfm

      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected InitialCamerasEstimatorListener InitialCamerasEstimator.mListener
      Listener to handle events raised by this instance.

      Gets listener to handle events raised by this instance.
